note: MP gauge + Max-HP scaling kit, both only partly supportable. skill1 omitted entirely: its two blocks are pure MP-gauge bookkeeping (no stat/damage) and blk3 is a Max HP buff (+6.34% x10) that has no engine bucket and only feeds HP-based damage - unsupportable. skill2 overridden: blk1 fires 'when MP is replenished' which happens on Full Burst entry, so modeled as fullBurstEnter -> Electric-Code allies get Elem-Advantage Attack Damage +40.9% and ATK +20.9% of caster ATK (10s); target is alliesOfElement Electric excludeSelf:true (kit: 'Affects all Electric Code allies except for self'). [2026-07-17 EXCLUDE-SELF FIX] excludeSelf now enforced on alliesOfElement (was silently ignored -> she had been self-buffing). On an Electric-advantaged (Water) boss her own Elem-Advantage +40.9% self-inflation was LARGE, not 'minor': removing it collapsed her T2 elec-weak comp 1.55 HOT -> 1.03 and tightened her board MAD 0.253 -> 0.098 (3 comps 0.81/1.03/1.55 -> 0.76/1.03/1.03). The residual 0.76 (Wind comp) is her SEPARATE documented burst Max-HP under-model, NOT to be masked by re-adding the self-buff. blk2 fires 'when MP is used' = on her burst, so burstCast -> self Elem-Advantage Attack Damage +31.68% (10s); its companion 'ATK +3.2% of caster final Max HP' is DROPPED (no Max-HP-to-ATK bucket in v1). blk3 (547.62% on every full charge) kept verbatim. Burst: 'Deals 1372.8% of (10% of Max HP + ATK), attacks repeatedly based on MP.' The Max HP portion is UNSUPPORTABLE and dropped (likely a large undercount for a high-HP Defender), and MP-at-cast can't be tracked literally; modeled as a steady-state 4 repeats of the ATK-only portion => 1372.8 x 4 = 5491.2% at burst cast. Both the MP count (could range ~4-12) and the omitted HP scaling are significant uncertainty flags - this burst is a conservative lower bound. CORRECTION (validated vs real elec-weak sample): the 547.62% hit reads 'when attacking with Full Charge for 1 TIME(s)' -- once per MP cycle, not per-shot; gated to her burst cast (0 procs when she never bursts, matching her real 251M = normals only). Her MP-used self buffs now include the previously-dropped ATK 3.2% of final Max HP. BURST CORRECTED (user-specified MP mechanic): +1 MP per full burst she does NOT burst in (cap 12), all consumed on her burst -> 1372.8% of (10% final Max HP + ATK) PER MP stack (stackedNuke effect; the previously-dropped Max-HP portion is included now). Q4 ANSWERED (user, 2026-07-13): the 547.62% procs on EVERY full-charged normal attack (always, in sim terms) -> shotFired (once per shot; her twin rockets are one attack). Q1-family range/FB exemption applied like the other proc kits; residual heat flagged for review. U2 SOLVED 2026-07-13 (video: docs/probes/'maiden solo neutral target probe.MP4'): the x0.68 was CADENCE, not value. Popup reads: rider = 437,296 non-crit / 655,945 crit vs ATK 80,118 -> full 547.62% kit value CONFIRMED (0.33% ATK rounding offset, same as her core-rocket popup 244,753); procs every pull; rocket instances can land off-core (auto-aim). Her real fire cycle is 1.77s/pull (6-pull mag over ~7.3s + ~2.9s reload) because auto releases at 156-212% OVERCHARGE (holds ~0.35s past full) -> charFixes.chargeFrames 81 (MEASURED; was 60) and rider restored to full value. Solo: ~102 pulls/180s vs the old model's 126. 2026-07-13 later: charFixes.chargeFrames 81 RETIRED — the engine-wide release-fired latency (60f charge + 22f = 82f) reproduces her measured 81f cycle within a frame. noFb RELIC REMOVED (2026-07-15, autonomous-invariant-audit): her 547.62% full-charge rider (shotFired) carried noFb:true -- a relic (DECISIONS-mandated; the rider lands during FB by timing -> +50%). noRange KEPT. Her 547.62% base is VIDEO-CONFIRMED (437,296 non-crit / 655,945 crit, docs/probes/'maiden solo neutral target probe.MP4') -- but that solo probe has NO FULL BURST, so it confirms only the BASE (out-FB) value; FB applying x1.5 to in-FB pulls is consistent with it, not refuted by it. Post-removal she grades ~0.80-1.44: the 1.44 (high-FB elem-advantage comp) is the rider getting FB; the 0.80 UNDER is a SEPARATE pre-existing issue -- her burst is a documented 'conservative lower bound' (dropped Max-HP scaling of the 1372.8%-per-MP stackedNuke). So her spread is two independent effects, not the noFb alone. OPEN: (a) confirm the rider's FB from a TEAM (with-FB) focus video; (b) close the burst Max-HP-scaling under-model. Do NOT re-fudge the rider. [materialized 2026-07-16: skill1 auto-filled from the offline parser (blablalink prose) — behavior-identical to the prior runtime parse; NOT hand-verified]

skill1: Activates when entering Burst Stage 1 with MP at 0. MP recovers by 1. MP can be accumulated up to a maximum of 12. All accumulated MP is consumed when using Burst Skill.
Activates when entering Full Burst with MP above 1. MP replenishes by 1. MP can be accumulated up to a maximum of 12. All accumulated MP is consumed when using Burst Skill.
Activates when attacking with Full Charge for 6 time(s). Affects self. Max HP ▲ 6.34% without restoring HP for 15 sec, stacks up to 10 time(s).

caveats: skill1: unparsed effect "MP replenishes by 1. MP can be accumulated up to a maximum of 12. All accumulated MP is consumed when using Burst Skill."
